No Poverty.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course explicitly aims to 'promote health and physical fitness' and 'develop a habit of regular exercise,' directly supporting Target 3.4 on preventing non-communicable diseases and promoting well-being.
evidence: 促進健康體能 (promote health and physical fitness)
養成規律運動的習慣 (develop a habit of regular exercise)

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3). The emphasis on 'teamwork' also contributes to skills for sustainable development (Target 4.7).
evidence: 培養團隊互助合作的運動精神 (Cultivate the spirit of teamwork and mutual cooperation)

Gender Equality.reason: The course is explicitly '男女合班' (male and female co-ed), ensuring equal participation in sports for all genders, aligning with Target 5.1 and 5.5.
evidence: 體育[男女合班] (Physical Education [male and female])

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to energy access or clean energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to employment, economic growth, or labor rights.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to infrastructure, industry, or innovation.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The '男女合班' (male and female co-ed) nature of the course promotes social inclusion irrespective of sex, directly supporting Target 10.2.
evidence: 體育[男女合班] (Physical Education [male and female])

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to urban development or community sustainability.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to consumption patterns or resource management.

Climate Action.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to climate change or environmental resilience.

Life Below Water.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to marine ecosystems or ocean health.

Life on Land.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The goal to 'cultivate the spirit of teamwork and mutual cooperation' can be weakly inferred as promoting a culture of peace and non-violence through sportsmanship (Target 16.b).
evidence: 培養團隊互助合作的運動精神 (Cultivate the spirit of teamwork and mutual cooperation)

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The emphasis on 'teamwork and mutual cooperation' reflects the spirit of partnership, a very minor link to multi-stakeholder partnerships (Target 17.17).
evidence: 培養團隊互助合作的運動精神 (Cultivate the spirit of teamwork and mutual cooperation)
